articles.title: Trump waives Jones Act shipping rules for 60 days to steady oil market
articles.market_impact: Energy: shipping law in an attempt to stabilize oil markets amid the Iran war, the White House confirmed to CNBC on Wednesday.; Stocks: shipping law in an attempt to stabilize oil markets amid the Iran war, the White House confirmed to CNBC on Wednesday.; Analyst: The statute has been criticized as a form of protectionism, and some economists have recently argued that it impedes domestic trade.
hard_facts: Official: The Trump administration "remains committed to continuing to strengthen our critical supply chains" amid the Iran war, press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.
Action: shipping law in an attempt to stabilize oil markets amid the Iran war, the White House confirmed to CNBC on Wednesday.
Data: Brent prices, the international benchmark, rose 3.83% on Wednesday to close at $107.38 per barrel.

articles.title: Vice President Vance to meet with oil industry as White House plans more actions to address fuel prices
articles.market_impact: Energy:  Vice President JD Vance and Energy Secretary Chris Wright will meet Thursday with the oil industry as the White House looks for ways to address surging fuel prices.; Stocks: The action is part of a broader effort by more than 30 nations to inject 400 million barrels into the market.
hard_facts: Official: They will discuss "supporting reliable energy supply amid global volatility," a spokesperson for API told CNBC.
Action: Consumers are seeing fuel prices rapidly rise as the Iran war has triggered the biggest oil supply disruption in history.
Data: Prices have increased about 35% since the U.S.
Timeline: API is the lobby group that represents all the big U.S.
